source_pr.title: *: enable tidb_enable_foreign_key variable default
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs520 <crazycs520@gmail.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #xxx

Problem Summary: This PR enable `tidb_enable_foreign_key` variable default first. I will delete `tidb_enable_foreign_key` variable before GA (https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/39672).

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: enable tidb_enable_foreign_key variable default.

evidence: files: br/tests/br_foreign_key/run.sh, cmd/explaintest/r/explain_foreign_key.result, cmd/explaintest/r/tpch.result, cmd/explaintest/t/explain_foreign_key.test, cmd/explaintest/t/tpch.test, ddl/cancel_test.go, ddl/db_table_test.go, ddl/foreign_key_test.go, ddl/restart_test.go, ddl/serial_test.go, executor/fktest/foreign_key_test.go, executor/set_test.go, executor/showtest/show_test.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go
